title: UPSESSB UP TGT 2022 Exam City Details 2026 for 3539 Post
short_information: Uttar Pradesh Secondary Education Service Selection Board (UPSESSB) has released the notification of Trained Graduate Teacher TGT Teacher Recruitment for 3539 posts. Those who are interested in this recruitment and fulfill the eligibility can apply online from 09 June 2022 to 03 July 2022. For the information of eligibility, age limit, selection procedure, pay scale, syllabus in recruitment, read the up tgt 2022 notification and then apply. Uttar Pradesh Secondary Education Service Selection Board (UPSESSB) UP Madhyamic Trained Graduate Teacher TGT Recruitment 2022 Online Form UP TGT Teacher Advt No. : 01/2022 Short Details of Notification
application_fee: General / OBC : 750/- EWS / : 450/- SC : 450/- ST : 250/- Pay the Examination Fee Through Debit Card / Credit Card / Net Banking OR E Challan Only. UPSESSB UP TGT Recruitment 2022
eligibility: Trained Graduate Teacher TGT (Balak) 1840 866 503 04 3213 Bachelor Degree with Related Subject and B.Ed Exam Passed. For Subject Wise Eligibility Read the Notification. Trained Graduate Teacher TGT (Balika) 212 83 31 0 326 UP TGT Recruitment 2022 Subject Wise
